When going on an important mission take a pie<e of Roti in your
hand and throw it in the direction you find many crows. This shall
ensure succ~s in your mission.
Soak black grams on Friday night and prepare them (by seasoning)
in mustard oil Give a little of the prepared grams to a horse or
buffa.lo and another part to a leper. Keep the third part on your
threshold after taking it round your head in anti-clockwise direction.
Do so for forty days to ensure smooth sailing in the professional
field.
Take a piece of a thread made of raw cotton or Kachd'la soot and
dye It with pure saffron chanting the following name: 'Om
Mahoalakshmyel Namah•. Tie this thread at your buslness·shop or
establishment. Your business shall flourish. For those in service should
keep this thread in the drawer of their table for better service
